---
title: "Mary Elizabeth Christie"
---

## Mary Elizabeth Christie

**Dates:** (1847-1906)

### Description

journalist

### Biography

Her <i>A Tardiness in Nature and Other Papers</i>  (Manchester: Manchester University Press 1907) has a biographical account.

### Letters

- Letter from November 19, 1897.
- Letter from December 15 (1896)
- Letter from December 10, 1896.
- Letter from December 8, 1896.
- Letter from December 3, 1896.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
